text.title: FinOps — Rightsizing + Graviton Migration Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the decision-record artefact this methodology produces, with valid + invalid examples and forbidden patterns.

example.note: Required field set to null and other required fields missing.

list.item: baseline_weeks: must match integer minimum 4; otherwise reject.
recommended_family: must match string (e.g. m6g.large, c7g.xlarge); otherwise reject.
graviton_evaluated: must match boolean const true; otherwise reject.
headroom_pct_over_p95: must match integer minimum 20; otherwise reject.
rollout_strategy: must match enum: blue-green, canary; otherwise reject.
estimated_monthly_savings_usd: must match number minimum 0; otherwise reject.
